name: Sam Avery
headline: PhD Candidate in Sociology
statement: I study how shared urban spaces shape a sense of belonging. My doctoral research follows community gardens as sites where neighbours negotiate care, ownership and everyday cooperation. (This is sample content — replace it with your own on the profile/data file.)
currentFocus: Doctoral fieldwork across three community gardens — interviews, participant observation, and a coding framework on belonging and reciprocity.

publications.title: Tending Together: Reciprocity in Urban Community Gardens
Mapping Third Places in a Mid-Sized City

conferences: Urban Life Graduate Conference — “Belonging in Shared Space” (talk)
